boundary: Autonomous QA replaced internal human review. Rejection is due to media quality/provenance blockers, not lack of owner approval.
remaining_blockers: Automated QA is complete, but this candidate still uses diagnostic/provisional audio.
Final production audio quality, voice/source license review, and release packaging remain blocked.
Release-resolution visual proof remains blocked unless the selected LTXV profile is at least 1280x720 and passes visual QA.
